authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Crooked Creek below the City of Los Angeles gauging station
reaches.fromDesc: City of Los Angeles (LADWP) gauging station
reaches.toDesc: confluence with Crowley Lake / Owens River drainage

reaches.name: Crooked Creek and tributaries above the City of Los Angeles gauging station
reaches.toDesc: City of Los Angeles (LADWP) gauging station

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(37) — Crooked Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (37) Crooked Creek (Mono Co.). (A) Crooked Creek below the City of Los Angeles gauging station. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) Crooked Creek and tributaries above the City of Los Angeles gauging station. All year. Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Crooked Creek below the City of Los Angeles (LADWP) gauging station is closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year below the LADWP gauging station
regulations.verbatimText: Crooked Creek below the City of Los Angeles gauging station. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year above the LADWP gauging station
regulations.verbatimText: Crooked Creek and tributaries above the City of Los Angeles gauging station. All year.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used above the gauging station
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout (catch-and-release only) above the gauging station

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
